top_signals.title: Saudis Turn to Russian Fuel Oil as Iran War Saps Fossil Power Supplies
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia continues to snap up high volumes of Russia’s fuel oil as the Hormuz crisis has forced shut oil and gas wells and reduced domestic supply for power generation amid rising temperatures. Russia’s vessel shipments of fuel oil and vacuum gasoil (VGO) slumped in May by some 6% from April, due to the continued Ukrainian strikes on Russian energy infrastructure, Reuters reported on Monday, quoting shipment data on LSEG and traders. Despite the overall decline in Russian fuel oil exports, to about 3.2 million metric tons last month,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Poised for Gains as Oil Holds Steady: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks were set for a positive open as oil largely held Monday’s losses, with investors continuing to watch developments in US-Iran peace talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gate CrossEx: An Exchange-Native Answer to the Institutional Capital Fragmentation Problem
top_signals.summary: For sophisticated crypto desks, the bottleneck has rarely been finding liquidity, but rather moving capital fast enough to use it. A fund running active books across the largest CEXs operates multiple separate balance sheets that don’t talk to each other. Every account must be funded to meet worst-case requirements. Collateral can’t be netted across venues. […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Microsoft fixes AutoGen Studio flaw that enabled code execution
top_signals.summary: A vulnerability chain dubbed AutoJack in Microsoft's AutoGen Studio interface for prototyping AI agents could let attackers manipulate an agent into executing arbitrary commands on its host system simply by visiting a malicious webpage. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Two children die in France as heatwave blasts Europe
top_signals.summary: France's average temperature broke a record for June as the country closed over 1,350 schools due to the extreme heat.
